_comment: Microsoft Entra External ID — self-service password reset (SSPR) configuration. Substitutes the legacy Azure AD B2C custom policy 'B2C_1A_PasswordReset'. SSPR in External ID is a tenant-level feature: enable + configure verification methods via Microsoft Graph (PATCH /policies/authenticationMethodsPolicy/authenticationMethodConfigurations/Email).
_todo_case_study_scaffold: If SMS verification is required, add 'sms' to verificationMethods after onboarding the External ID SMS feature in the tenant.
Localise the SSPR experience via tenant branding (POST /branding/localizations) for the 12 supported languages.
